title: convolvulus dregeanus
intro: Convolvulus dregeanus, also known as the Drege's bindweed, is a climbing plant species native to southern Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Convolvulus dregeanus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be applied directly to the affected areas.
